specializations: Encapsulation technologies for cosmetics and personal care
product_highlights: DeliCaps™ — low-density microcapsule technology for premium personal care
ScentEssence™ — encapsulated fragrance delivery for long-lasting consumer experience
ProBiome® — microbiome-friendly encapsulation for probiotic actives in personal care
Custom delivery system development across polymer, lipid, and carbohydrate shell technologies
notes: IFF is one of the world's top ingredient manufacturers for fragrances, flavors, health, and biosciences — including a significant encapsulation technology portfolio serving personal care and home care markets. Following its merger with DuPont Nutrition & Biosciences, IFF expanded its delivery system capabilities to include bioscience-based encapsulation for probiotic and microbiome actives. Their global manufacturing footprint and broad shell technology expertise make them a critical supplier reference for the SKIN-TWIN formulation engine.
